title: Set up your garage
subtitle: A few things to get you running. You can do these in any order.

labour_rate.label: Labour rate
labour_rate.why: the hourly rate jobs are priced at

tax.label: Tax
tax.why: VAT status and rate for your quotes and invoices

resources.label: Lifts & bays
resources.why: needed to schedule jobs in the diary

employees.label: Employees
employees.why: your mechanics and staff for the roster and reports

overheads.label: Overheads
overheads.why: fixed costs, so your margins are accurate

allDoneBody: Everything that applies to your garage is set up.

walk.finishBody: Your garage is set up. You can revisit any of this from Settings.
